question.label: Last cycle impact
question.name: When you say 'last cycle' — what part of it is still sticking with you?
question.description: Clarifies the specific unresolved piece from the prior cycle before progressing the growth conversation.

answer: The feedback was not specific enough.

assessment.note: She names vague feedback as the unresolved issue, signalling low clarity on the bar and a strong growth blockage.

new_queue.label: Specific enough
new_queue.name: What was missing from the feedback, specifically?

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?

new_queue.label: Selection readout
new_queue.name: What readout did you get on why you weren’t selected?

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?

new_queue.label: Current direction
new_queue.name: What kind of growth are you actually looking for next?

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make space for that growth?

new_queue.label: Manager support
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change the game for you?

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: What’s the first concrete thing you want to move before we talk again?
